encounters.trigger: The shade blocks the main gate, preventing entry to the inner sanctum.
The librarian reads an incantation to summon the boss, requiring interruption.
The sentinel guards the altar; defeating it opens the gateway to the Boss Arena.

output.objective: Extinguish the Abyssal Flame and banish the void-stalker.

boss.name: The Void-Stalker
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Void to destabilize the entity then strike with the Fire Staff.

output.setting: A crumbling obsidian fortress at the edge of the void.

normalized.setting: A crumbling obsidian fortress at the edge of the void.

boss.victory_condition: Offer the Enchanted Nut to calm the spirit.
